body:
# Lukas Finnveden

[Lukas](https://www.linkedin.com/in/lukas-finnveden-787a07145/) is a Research Analyst at [Redwood Research](https://www.redwoodresearch.org/). Before that, he was a Research Fellow at [Open Philanthropy](https://www.openphilanthropy.org/) and a Research Scholar at the University of Oxford’s Future of Humanity Institute. He has a B.S. in Computer Science from KTH Royal Institute of Technology.
text: Lukas Finnveden Lukas is a Research Analyst at Redwood Research. Before that, he was a Research Fellow at Open Philanthropy and a Research Scholar at the University of Oxford’s Future of Humanity Institute. He has a B.S. in Computer Science from KTH Royal Institute of Technology.
